notes: Companion to cleanup-k8s-stress-001: identical post-job cleanup mechanism (gh api DELETE on workflow artifacts → HTTP 403) but in a different repo with a different run ID. Line-level Jaccard with cleanup-k8s-stress-001 is ~0.67 (below the 0.80 near-duplicate threshold). Stress axis: repo-generalization — does each method succeed on the same mechanism expressed in two different projects?
